Caption: Adaptive control flow for smart-structure damage detection and response. Upon thresh- old exceedance, the system implements graduated responses based on damage magnitude: attitude control for low-magnitude erosion, surface morphology modification for high-magnitude damage, and combined control strategies for medium-magnitude scenarios. Sub-threshold damage requires no active control feedback.
Training and test loss function after 50000 epochs.
Clustering of values to understand the variance and systematic bias.
